turns.instruction: Create the first complete artifact from the brief and source context. Do not invent facts.
Critique unsupported claims, missing nuance, hidden risks, weak evidence use, and failure modes. Give concrete repair instructions.
Rewrite the artifact to repair the highest-value failures while preserving what works.
Pressure-test the repaired artifact as a skeptical executive or domain expert.
Synthesize the best near-final artifact, resolve critique, and keep within target word count.

This is the final document. Produce the highest-quality final artifact, not another critique. Preserve the strongest technical insights from previous turns, but the final must pass artifact validity gates: clean ending, required sections, target word band, no internal process residue, source-grounded claims only, and any brief-required disclaimer.
